actionCalls.name: Copy_2_of_Log_Error_Error_Getting_Commission_Summary
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error Getting Commission Records for Opportunity

value.stringValue: Error Getting Commission Records for Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Copy_2_of_Log_Error_Error_Updating_the_Opportunity
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error Updating the Account - Setting Commission Rule Group

value.stringValue: Error Setting the Commission Rule Group

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_Getting_Commission_Records
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error Getting Commission Records

value.stringValue: Error Getting Commission Records from Commission Summary

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_Getting_Opportunity_History_Approved_Records
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error Getting Opportunity History Approved Records

value.stringValue: Error Getting Opportunity History Approved Records

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_Getting_the_Updated_Referred_By_Account
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error Getting the Updated Referred By Account

value.stringValue: Error Getting the Updated Referred By Account

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_Updating_Commission_Records
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error Updating Commission Records

value.stringValue: Error Updating Commission Records to New Referred By

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_Updating_Opportunity_Referred_By_Just_Referred_By
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error Updating Opportunity Referred By - Just Referred By

value.stringValue: Error Updating Opportunity Referred By - Just Referred By

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_Updating_the_Opportunity
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error Updating the Opportunity

value.stringValue: Commission Created for New Referred By
Commission Updated to New Referred By

assignments.name: Assign_Count_of_Commission
assignments.label: Assign Count of Commission Records found

assignments.name: Assign_Referred_By_Commission_Rule_Group
assignments.label: Assign Referred By Commission Rule Group

assignments.name: Set_Boolean_Flag_for_Has_Been_Apprvoed
assignments.label: Set Boolean Flag for Has Been Apprvoed

assignments.name: Set_Flag_Commission_Has_Been_Paid_Rejected
assignments.label: Set Flag Commission Has Been Paid/Rejected

collectionProcessors.description: Filter out just the Commission records.
collectionProcessors.name: Filter_For_Commission_Type_Records
collectionProcessors.label: Filter For Commission Type Records

decisions.description: Here we check to see if the Opportunity has ever been approved. If so then we don't need to create Commission but allow changing the referred by.
decisions.name: Has_Opportunity_Ever_Been_Approved
decisions.label: Has Opportunity Ever Been Approved

rules.name: Commission_has_been_paid_or_rejected
rules.label: Commission has been paid or rejected

decisions.description: Here we check if the Opportunity Field History NewValue is Approved. If so then we need to set a flag to true.
decisions.name: Is_NewValue_Approved
decisions.label: Is NewValue Approved?

decisions.name: New_Referred_By_Has_Commission_Rule_Group
decisions.label: New Referred By Has Commission Rule Group?

decisions.name: Update_Commissions_Create_Commission_or_End_Flow
decisions.label: Update Commissions, Create Commission, or End Flow?

decisions.name: User_is_Able_to_Modify_Opportunity
decisions.label: User is Able to Modify Opportunity?

Flow.description: This will allow users to change the referred by and move/add commission when needed
Flow.label: Screenflow - Opportunity - Update Referred By

loops.description: We now will loop thru as we can't filter or query on NewValue field.
loops.name: Loop_Through_Field_History_Opportunity
loops.label: Loop Through Field History - Opportunity

loops.description: Now we need to go thru the commission records and see if the Commission Summary is paid or not.
loops.name: Loop_Thru_Commission_Type_Records
loops.label: Loop Thru Commission Type Records

recordLookups.name: Get_Commissions
recordLookups.label: Get All Commissions that are Assigned to the Opportunity

recordLookups.name: Get_Opportunity_History_Check_if_Opportunity_has_been_approved
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity History - Check if Opportunity has been approved

recordUpdates.name: Set_Commission_Group_on_the_Employee_Account
recordUpdates.label: Set Commission Group on the Employee Account

fields.name: MissingReferredBy
fields.fieldText: New Referred By is Missing a Commission Plan. Assign Commission Plan:

fields.name: txt_CantChangeReferredBy
fields.fieldText: The Commission Period record has already been approved or rejected. The referred by can not be changed once the commission has been paid.

fields.name: CommissionsNotActivated
fields.fieldText: Commissions are currently not activated.

fields.name: txt_ShowCreateCommissionError
fields.fieldText:
There was an error creating the commission record. Please see the below error message.


Error Message:

{!Create_Commission_Subflow.txt_ErrorMessage}

fields.name: txt_FaultError
fields.fieldText:
Looks like we got into an error. Please see the below error and if you need assistance please reach out to the help desk team.



Error Message:

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: txt_SuccessScreen
fields.fieldText: Referred By Updated Successfully.

fields.name: YouDontHavePermission
fields.fieldText: You do not have permission to modify the Referred By on this Opportunity. Please contact a System Administrator.

fields.name: Do_you_want_to_update_Commissions_to_the_new_Referred_By
fields.fieldText: Do you want to update Commissions to the new Referred By?

fields.name: Do_you_want_to_create_a_Commission_to_the_new_Referred_By
fields.fieldText: Do you want to create a Commission to the new Referred By?

subflows.name: Get_Commission_Summary_for_New_Referred_By
subflows.label: Get Commission Summary for New Referred By

variables.description: This variable will tell us if the opportunity has ever been approved or not. Used in the Opportunity Field History loop.
variables.name: bool_OpportunityHasBeenApproved
